command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no jose@192.168.0.202 "cat > /tmp/fix_telegram2.py << 'PYEOF'
# Read the full config
with open('/home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Find telegram section and add bot_token and allowed_users after it
import re

# Replace the telegram section block
old = 'telegram:
  reactions: false
  channel_prompts: {}
  allowed_chats: '
new = 'telegram:
  bot_token: "8849049212:AAG4BfaeqinpzPxN-EKmtsMTFZeUc01nua0"
  allowed_users: "8869156588"
  reactions: false
  channel_prompts: {}
  allowed_chats: '

content = content.replace('telegram:
  reactions: false
  channel_prompts: {}
  allowed_chats: ', new, 1)

with open('/home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml', 'w') as f:
    f.write(content)

print('done')
PYEOF
python3 /tmp/fix_telegram2.py && grep -A6 '^telegram:' /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml | head -8"
